---
title: "Descriptive Statistics — Rincón"
author: "Guilber"
date: 2026-06-15
categories: [Book, Statistics]
---

Notes on the descriptive statistics chapters from Luis Rincón's probability and statistics textbook.

::: {.callout-note}
Replace this with your actual reading notes.
:::

## Test ggplot2

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
source("theme_radicle_night.R")

# This is a comment
ggplot(mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Engine Displacement vs Highway MPG",
    x = "Displacement (L)",
    y = "Highway MPG"
  ) +
  scale_color_radicle_night() +
  theme_radicle_night()
```
